feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Committing the Project Budget during material withdrawal using Reservation
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am currently moving from ECC 6.0 to the Public Cloud. Previously in ECC 6.0, I had set up Budget Control for WBS elements for material withdrawals from the warehouse, and the system would record the commitment at the time of reservation. However, in the Public Cloud, the system does not record a commitment during material withdrawal. How can I resolve this issue?

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: How to maintain Credit Analyst?
entry.content:
Credit Analyst has to be maintained in order to fill this field in Documented Credit Decision (DCD).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV Complete order
entry.content:
I created a purchase order in SAP using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV and have already delivered it. Now I want to complete the order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV.
To do this, I call the API as follows: 
HTTP-Methode ist 'Patch'
https://testfim.com:8443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurchaseOrder('(6222222222')

The request for this is:
{
"PurchasingCompletenessStatus" : "true"
}

HTTP-Response: 
~status_code: 400
~status_reason Bad Request
Message: The data service request contains SystemQueryOptions that are not permitted for this request type.

Does anyone know how to complete an order using the API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV API?
I would appreciate any help.

entry.title: Restrict Tasks created in the Manage My Timesheet app
entry.content:
Hi,

 

In our employee time report, we can see time submitted by users using cost center and activity types only. We only need them to charge on WBS element or non project related task types. Is it possible to limit them on creating tasks using Cost center and activity type only? And how can we do that?

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 【sap public cloud】BUSINESS_PARTNER POST ERROR
entry.content:
Nice to meet you.

I am trying to add supplier master data to "BusinessPartner" in "SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud" using tRestClient in "Talend8 Cloud".

The JSON format data to be passed to tRestClient can be registered successfully in POSTMAN, but the following error occurs in Talend. It would be appreciated if you could tell me what the cause is.

Error while parsing an XML stream: 'BOM / charset detection failed'.

 

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

はじめまして

「Talend8 cloud」で「sap s/4hana public cloud」の「API_BUSINESS_PARTNER」へtRestclientを使い、サプライヤマスタの追加を試しています。

tRestclientへ渡すJSON形式のデータは、POSTMANでは正常に登録可能なのですが、Talendだと以下のエラーが発生しております。何が原因かご教示頂けると助かります。

Error while parsing an XML stream: 'BOM / charset detection failed'.

entry.title: Please tell me how to check which users IT Contact is set for.
entry.content:
Please tell me how to check which users IT Contact is set for.

Is there a way to check this from SAP for Me?
What other ways are there to check this?

I want to know which user is currently set as the IT Contact before changing it.

entry.title: GR 相关配置问题咨询
entry.content:
1、配置ID102660,允许组货币作为主要货币是什么意思，其他系统有“科目集成的正确物料组”


2、配置DIGITS，重分类方法中的触发器要怎么配置


3、如果我需要一个以人民币出具的合并报表是不是需要新增一个组货币为CNY的合并分类账


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic conversion of quantities-unit of measure on stock display
entry.content:
Hello, hope this message finds you well.


My question is about Warehouse Management on the Cloud Public.
I have set alternative uom on the product 43´s masterdata. 1 bag = 10 pc.


But the stock is shown in the warehouse monitor with in the uom pc both in the regular and in the alternative one.


I have attached the print screens. 


I need for the system to automatically display both quantities (in base-uom and converted in alternative uom). Example: base uom 100 pc; alternative uom 10 bag. 


May you help me with that?


Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: For the intercompany transactions, is it possible to create the inbound delivery document via API?
entry.content: For the intercompany transactions, is it possible to create the inbound delivery document (SD document number) via an API interface?

entry.title: Question for reduction of O inventory when Outsourcing purchasing
entry.content: For the Outsourcing purchasing, does the step of reducing the O inventory quantity involve creating a document. If yes, what type of document is it? Is it possible to achieve both the goods receipt and the reduction of O inventory quantity through an API interface for external collaboration procurement?

entry.title: API interface for reversing goods receipt
entry.content: When reversing a goods receipt, does the system create a new document with movement type 102? If so, how to reverse the original document? Is it possible to perform this reversal operation through an API interface?

entry.title: API interfaces for the reversal of production goods receipt and production material issue
entry.content: For the reversal of production goods receipt and production material issue, is it necessary to reverse the original document and then create a new document? If so, what are the corresponding API interfaces for these operations?

entry.title: The API interface for cost-based material withdrawal
entry.content: Is “./sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/A_MaterialDocumentHeader” the correct API interface for cost-based material withdrawal? Are there any differences in the interface parameters compared to those for a standard document?

entry.title: Multiple Country Activation in CBC
entry.content:
We need to activate multiple countries and company codes in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud implementation.

In SAP note 3151804, SAP recommends activating only 5 countries at a time. However, with multiple company codes to set up for each country, our assumption was that we have to complete the primary finance settings and organisational structure set up before we can activate more countries. Then I came across a footnote in SAP learning material below:

We recommend activating no more than 5 countries at a time for system performance purposes. This means choosing the first 5 countries you want to activate and selecting the Complete Activity button, then going back to activate any additional countries and selecting the Complete Activity button again.

I will like to confirm that we do not have to complete organisational structure set up for each group of 5 countries before we activate the next set of countries. i.e.  can we activate all the countries before moving on to primary finance settings and organisational structure activities in CBC?

entry.title: Manage Workflow for Project Billing Requests setup using a Badi to do a check on a custom field
entry.content:
Good day,

There is a current workflow setup for our zero rated documents that is on the manage billing document. We recently enabled 4E9 for project billing and the same workflow needs to be setup for project billing at the preliminary billing document stage only for zero rated documents. We did find a SAP standard workflow  named Manage Workflow for Project Billing Requests but we are unable to make use of a badi to initiate the zero rated logic for workflow. We are seeking assistance with the setup of Manage Workflow for Project Billing Requests to use a Badi to do a check on a custom field.

regards,

Haaroon

entry.title: Request for Enabling Periodic Billing in Sales Order – SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

We are currently working on creating a Sales Order with Periodic Billing in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, we are facing the following issue:

The Periodic Billing option is not available.

The system is defaulting to Milestone Billing, and we are unable to change the billing plan type to Periodic.

We request your assistance in this matter. If there is a configuration, workaround, or standard SAP solution available to enable Periodic Billing in Public Cloud, kindly share the details with us.

Looking forward to your support.

entry.title: Refresh table after execute bound action
entry.content:
i have an RAP app on top of Public Cloud with multiple views (table) which show records with different status on each tab.

I have a bound action to select row/s to update the status. Currently, status is updated but it still sits in the current table.

The expectation is after action is executed, the status of the record will change and the the current view will update making the record disappear in current table and move to another view.

I've tried using side effects but it doesn't work. Is there a way to make the tables refresh after execute of bound action?

  side effects
  {
//tried both but doesnt work
    action updateStatus affects field Status;
    action updateStatus affects $self;
  }

entry.title: SAP ERP Public cloud Scope items list
entry.content: where can i get or download the SAP ERP Public cloud Scope items list.

entry.title: India TCS/TDS withholding report after executing line items are showing in RED Colour
entry.content:
'India Withholding Tax (TDS/TCS) Status Report” Fiori tile, data entries within the report are being displayed with a red background color, indicating an error or exception state. However, the system does not provide any specific error message or reason for the red highlighting.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EBS – Outgoing payment automatic clearing
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

On S/4HANA Public Cloud outgoing payments processed in SAP are not automatically cleared when Bank Statement is imported.

When the outgoing payment is created in the DMEE file, xml structure the number of payment document is available in the field End to End ID in form HR00##########.

In the SSCUI 101024 Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank Statement Posting rule F004 and interpretation algorithm 020 – Document Number are assigned to External transaction.

In SSCUI 103635 Define Parameter Sets Document number range is assigned.

But when the bank statement is imported no document is found and automatic clearing is not performed.

In App Manage Processing Rule Action Types AP/AR Posting (for subledger clearing) or Clear in Sequence are available. Additionally conditions are set: Memo line contains HR00 and external transaction. Additionally substring logic that would extract document number is missing (like substring start position 5 (to skip HR00) and length 10 or search string mapping HR00########## -> ##########).

What is correct approach to set substring in Manage Processing Rule to extract correct document number?

Kind regards,

Slađana Lučić
